name: Airtable
description: Airtable is a spreadsheet-database hybrid that lets you create flexible, relational databases with a simple interface. Use this API to manage bases, tables, and records programmatically, supporting rich field types like attachments, linked records, and formulas.

capabilities.name: list_records
capabilities.description: Retrieve records from a table in a base, with optional filtering, sorting, and field selection.

capabilities.name: create_record
capabilities.description: Create one or more new records in a table with specified field values.

capabilities.name: update_record
capabilities.description: Update fields on an existing record in a table, leaving unspecified fields unchanged.

capabilities.name: delete_record
capabilities.description: Permanently delete one or more records from a table by their record IDs.

capabilities.name: list_bases
capabilities.description: List all bases the authenticated user has access to, including their names and permission levels.

capabilities.name: get_base_schema
capabilities.description: Retrieve the schema of a base, including all tables, their fields, field types, and configuration.
